rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax and placed in component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees or implementation annexes for bindings.
Timing and scheduling constraints from requirements must be translated into valid AGREE guarantee clauses using available model ports and properties.
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model for AGREE variable references.
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed in the model.
Avoid unsafe Boolean or numeric comparisons on event ports without model-provided data values.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts require valid component type or implementation scope based on the clause type.
Guarantee clauses must reference valid component ports or model-defined constants.
anti_patterns: Do not generate AGREE expressions that reference AADL property names as variables without explicit model exposure.
Do not encode event ports as numeric or Boolean values without model-provided data.
irrelevant_topics: AADL component type and implementation structure extraction
